Notice Of Motion And Motion To Withdraw As Attorneys Of Record
Off Calendar Sep-23-2008 Off Calendar

Petition For Enforcement Of Court Order, Award Of Interest, Attorney'S Fees,
Off Calendar Aug-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Tim Chambers for Willie Pickens (Petitioner). Burton McGovern for Alicia Savage (Respondent/Trustee).

Mr. Chambers stated that he was not successful in correcting the issues raised by the Examiner's notes. Mr. McGovern stipulated to going forward with the matter. The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Neu.

Petition For Appointment Of Willie Pickens Trustee Of The Trust Created For The Benefit Of Allen Pickens Pursuant To The Terms Of The Pickens Family
Off Calendar May-13-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Burton McGovern for Alicia Savage (Trustee/Respondent). Tim Chambers for Willie Pickens (Petitioner). Allen Pickens (Son).

Mr. McGovern stated that they had gone to mediation and that they were requesting approval of the settlement. Mr. Chambers stated that he had no objection and that he was willing to proceed as long as his client was appointed trustee of the Allen Pickens Trust. The parties disagreed as to the accounting being approved and the Court raised the issue regarding the attorney's fees. After further argument and discussion, the Court ruled as follows: 1) The Petition To Approve The Settlement was granted. 2) The accounting was allowed, but not approved, (the attorney's fees were included in the accounting). 3) The Petition To Appoint Willie Pickens as Trustee was granted. A bond in the amount of $92,000.00 is required. 4) Alicia Savage is to pay $92,000.00 to the Allen Pickens Trust within 14 days of the order being signed. Mr. Chambers will prepare and submit the order. The matter was set for June 2, 2008 for status on filing of the bond.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lazatin.

Application For Determination That Proposed Amended Objection To Accounting; Petition For Order Directing Transfer Of Property, And Directing Payment Of Damages For Breach Of Trust, Etc Does Not Violate The Terms Of The No Contest Clause In The Pickens Family Trust
Off Calendar Aug-27-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: TIM CHAMBERS, APPEARING FOR WILLIE PICKENS; BURTON MCGOVERN, APPEARING FOR ALICIA SAVAGE

MR. MCGOVERN OPPOSES THE AMENDED PETITION. HE ASK THAT THE SALE OF THE PROPERTY BE VOIDED AND THAT THE PROPERTY BE RETURN TO THE TRUST. HE STATES THAT PETITION IS AN ASSAULT ON HIS CLIENT AND WOULD LIKE A WRITTEN RESPONSE. MR. CHAMBERS STATES THAT THE SALE OF THE PROPERTY DID NOT VIOLATE THE FIDUCIARY RESPONSIBILITIES AND DOES NOT VIOLATE THE TERMS OF A NO CONTEST CLAUSE.
THE COURT INSTUCTED MR. CHAMBER TO PREPARE AN ORDER AND TO SHOW ORDER TO MR. MCGOVERN. THE TERMS OF THE NO CONTEST CLUASE WAS NOT VIOLATED.

JUDGE:JOHN DEARMAN;REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN,CSR#11722; CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON; BALIFF:M. LOOS

Petition For Appointment Of Guardian Ad Litem
Off Calendar Mar-27-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Maureen McFadden appearing for and with petitioner Willie Pickens. Burton McGovern appearing for respondent/trustee. The creditor's claim was rejected. Ms. McFadden wants time to respond and file an amended claim. She has received the accounting and she wants to amended her petition. Petition for declaratory relief is granted with leave to amend petition for instructions and permission to amend creditor's claim. Ms. McFadden will submit a new order. Peition for appointment of guardian ad litem is granted. Order signed.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Dave Davenport CSR# 1694. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Loos.
